title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Qualcomm India Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Qualcomm India Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Qualcomm India Global Group in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Qualcomm India Global Group:
Qualcomm India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Qualcomm India Global Group!
